class.name: VirtualTouchPad
class.brief_description: A control for relative touch movement, ideal for camera control.
class.description:
[VirtualTouchPad] is a specialized control for tracking relative movement (deltas). It behaves similarly to a laptop trackpad or a mouse.
**Architecture Note (Pure Motion):** This node is strictly designed for **Continuous Motion** (e.g., controlling a 3D camera, aiming a weapon). It emits [InputEventVirtualMotion] based on the relative movement of the finger between frames.

members.member: The hand this touchpad is designed for. Affects the default virtual axis indices if not overridden.
The virtual axis index to emit for horizontal movement.
The virtual axis index to emit for vertical movement.

constants.constant: Left hand. Uses axes 0 and 1 by default.
Right hand. Uses axes 2 and 3 by default.
